name: operating_income_paraphrase
source_text: Operating income was $21.2 billion, up 61% year over year, and trailing 12-month free cash flow was $36.2 billion.
claim: Record quarterly operating income of $21.2B, up 61% YoY
excerpt: Operating income was $21.2 billion, up 61% year over year, and trailing 12-month free cash flow was strong.
bad_canonical_excerpt: Operating income was $21.2 billion, up 61% year over year, and trailing 12-month free cash flow was $36.2 billion.

name: aws_capacity_constraints
source_text: Capacity constraints remain a headwind for AWS. They come in the form of chips, power constraints, and other components like motherboards that are short in supply.
claim: AWS capacity constraints limiting growth due to chip supply, power, and component shortages
excerpt: They come in the form of chips, power constraints, and other components like motherboards that are short in supply.
bad_canonical_excerpt: They come in the form of chips, power constraints, and motherboards that are short.

name: nvidia_paraphrase_rescue
source_text: We saw strong demand in data center and raised our full-year outlook. Margins expanded due to mix. FX remained a headwind.
excerpt: Management raised full-year outlook on data center strength.
good_canonical_excerpt: We saw strong demand in data center and raised our full-year outlook.
